remarks: Please submit highest and best offer by Tuesday, 6/9 at 5pm! Welcome to the ultimate in carefree, city-chic living! Located in the sought-after Greenbriar complex, this sunny, immaculate 2-bed, 2.5-bath townhouse delivers the perfect balance of style, convenience, and tranquility. Tucked quietly away from the street at the back of the community, this light-filled home features an open floor plan with brand-new hardwood floors throughout, a cozy wood-burning fireplace, and a versatile sunroom/office overlooking a peaceful courtyard-ideal for remote work. The spacious living and dining areas flow seamlessly into a gourmet eat-in kitchen boasting granite countertops, updated cabinetry, a breakfast bar, and sliders to a private deck. Upstairs, both generously sized bedrooms offer private en-suite baths and abundant closet space; the primary suite features a newly renovated spa-like bath, while the second bedroom enjoys a huge walk-in closet. Complete with one covered carport, an additional reserved parking space, and ample visitor parking. Enjoy turnkey living just steps from vibrant Downtown Stamford shopping, top-tier dining, parks, and public transit!
